name: Parker House Inn Creme Brulee
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the cream in a heavy-duty saucepan.
2. Beat the egg yolks, sugar, and vanilla with an electric mixer until pale and thick.
3. Slowly pour the hot cream into the egg mixture while beating at the lowest speed.
4. Pour the mixture into custard cups and place them in a roasting pan.
5. Pour very hot water into the pan so that it covers two-thirds of the sides of the cups.
6. Bake at 325°F for 35-45 minutes, or until set but not overbaked. If holding, chill before serving.
7. Just before serving, sprinkle granulated sugar on top and caramelize with a propane torch or under a broiler until browned and bubbly.
8. Garnish with raspberries or other fruits if desired.
Serves 4 (6-ounce portions) or 6 (4-ounce portions).
